description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade includes large windows and a recessed entryway, flanked by two garage doors and a driveway leading to the street. The rear of the house opens to a private patio area with outdoor seating and small landscaped sections. The side views reveal minimal window openings and a focus on privacy, with solid wall sections dominating the exterior. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with some metal and glass elements for windows and railings. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, dual garages, and a private rear patio, built with concrete and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual garages, large windows, and the main entryway facing the street.
description_view_1: Left side view with solid walls, minimal windows, and a driveway extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a private patio, outdoor seating, and smaller windows.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with solid wall sections and limited window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with large glass panels, dual garage doors, and a paved driveway
